headline: Intel and Google deepen AI ties for chip design
summary: Intel Corporation (INTC) and Google Cloud announced an expanded partnership on Thursday 16th, deploying Gemini Enterprise across Intel’s workforce and pushing agentic AI tools into its chip design process, according to an Intel Newsroom statement.
